,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_1","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.1","title_id":"author_level_1"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.1","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.1"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7254127757653707810","book_info":{"abstract":"【LOL+电竞文+日常+甜宠+女子战队】
女频电竞文，主线电竞，支线感情线。主角要应付大反派各种宫心计，内心戏较多。
晋级赛赛点局，朱丽丽惨遭队友挂机，晋级失败。
朱丽丽太气了，瞬间把键盘摔烂！
朱丽丽，一位热爱英雄联盟的大一女生，怀揣着一个雄心勃勃的目标——组建一支女子战队。
可惜，刚开局，朱丽丽就遇到了一个大反派，还是学校最有钱的师姐。
她招募了一群志同道合的女生，每个人都有着自己的电竞梦。
在这个男性主导的电竞世界中，朱丽丽的女子战队面临着巨大的压力和质疑。
朱丽丽的女子战队，真的能组建起来吗？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o880e578b50637793074bac6b607acab2~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"冬瓜爱上南瓜","author_id":"","book_id":"7254127757653707810","book_name":"电竞妖姬：女子战队杀疯了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f0e8c8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":749,"name":"青春甜宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=749&name=青春甜宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":96,"name":"甜宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=96&name=甜宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":4,"name":"校园","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=4&name=校园&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":94,"name":"团宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=94&name=团宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":508,"name":"电竞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=508&name=电竞&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7254181991351779900","read_count":"71","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1019964"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"426","tags":"青春甜宠,现代言情,校园,团宠,甜宠,电竞","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/bc11c2e5e69dc3c98d6c7b2709c66ee1~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779449139&x-signature=miwDJwHyUUrel8WQULJEz%2B4O3rU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"71321392512","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"444"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323192539F72BE179F90DBD40DE86"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读38小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":75206,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":136430,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":91},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1713965366,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7301983407700755226","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"电竞女主的角色塑造得栩栩如生，让人仿佛置身于激烈的赛场之中。作品中的女主角勇敢、聪明、热情洋溢，不仅展示了女性在电竞世界的风采，还颠覆了传统观念，为我们树立了新时代女性的榜样。与此同时，作者对电竞行业的深入洞察和细腻的情感描绘，使得这部作品充满了真实感和说服力。让人欲罢不能，一口气想要看完所有章节。总的来说，这部作品不仅是一部充满激情的电竞小说，更是一部展现女性力量和拼搏精神的佳作！加油作者，期待你更多精彩的作品！","text_exts":[{"e":14,"s":10,"text":"栩栩如生","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%A0%A9%E6%A0%A9%E5%A6%82%E7%94%9F&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774265139BD40DE86%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227301983407700755226%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227254127757653707810%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%A0%A9%E6%A0%A9%E5%A6%82%E7%94%9F%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1700126864,"group_id":"7254127757653707810","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"擅长把激动人心的情节处理得如同嚼蜡。本人二次元肥宅一枚","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5ZOQ7tZPOjErJW6T+e1YSrgtcSyVpTpSW5R2Gn0qcw1","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/b0faf548ed15469e839d2f992fa84985~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776794716&x-signature=qHGGEVHrPaA%2BZQiva%2BSZ2KnQlnU%3D","user_id":"1772841559664008","user_name":"虐凝梨宝"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1772841559664008","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_offi
